title: Swab insertion limiter
abstract: An insertion limiter for a swab is configured to couple the insertion limiter to a shaft of the swab and fasten a stopper that acts to prevent insertion of a proximal end of the swab deeper than a maximum insertion depth.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. Apparatus to limit insertion of a swab having a shaft and a proximal end into an orifice of a person, the apparatus comprising: a stopper having a proximal end and a stopper radius at the proximal end greater than an orifice radius of the orifice; and a fastener configured to couple the stopper to the shaft of the swab and to fasten the proximal end of the coupled stopper at a maximum insertion depth from the proximal end of the swab, the proximal end of the fastened stopper limiting insertion of the proximal end of the swab into the orifice beyond the maximum insertion depth. 2. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein: the fastener includes an elastic member configured to exert minimum tension on the shaft when the proximal end of the stopper is fastened to the shaft at the maximum insertion depth but not when the stopper is coupled to the shaft without the proximal end of the stopper being fastened to the shaft at the maximum insertion depth. 3. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein: the swab includes an indentation along the shaft of the swab; and the fastener includes an elastic member from which a protrusion configured to enter the indentation when the proximal end of the stopper is fastened to the shaft at the maximum insertion depth but not when the stopper is coupled to the shaft without the proximal end of the stopper being fastened to the shaft at the maximum insertion depth. 4. The apparatus of claim 3, wherein: the protrusion from the elastic member is configured to resist displacement of the protrusion from the indentation along the shaft. 5. The apparatus of claim 3, wherein: the protrusion from the elastic member is configured to resist displacement of the proximal end of the stopper from the maximum insertion depth from the proximal end of the swab. 6. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein: the fastener is configured to slidably couple to the shaft of the swab. 7. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein: the stopper is configured to slidably couple to the shaft of the swab. 8. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein: the fastener includes an internal cavity configured to receive at least a portion of the shaft of the swab. 9. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein: the stopper includes an internal cavity configured to receive at least a portion of the shaft of the swab. 10. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein: the fastener includes a set of one or more tines configured to clamp onto the shaft of the swab. 11. A system comprising: a swab having a shaft and a proximal end to be inserted into an orifice of a person; and an insertion limiter that includes: 

 a stopper having a proximal end and a stopper radius at the proximal end greater than an orifice radius of the orifice; and a fastener configured to couple the stopper to the shaft of the swab and to fasten the proximal end of the coupled stopper at a maximum insertion depth from the proximal end of the swab, the proximal end of the fastened stopper limiting insertion of the proximal end of the swab into the orifice beyond the maximum insertion depth. 12. The system of claim 11, wherein: the fastener includes an elastic member configured to exert minimum tension on the shaft when the proximal end of the stopper is fastened to the shaft at the maximum insertion depth but not when the stopper is coupled to the shaft without the proximal end of the stopper being fastened to the shaft at the maximum insertion depth. 13. The system of claim 11, wherein: the swab includes an indentation along the shaft of the swab; and the fastener includes an elastic member from which a protrusion configured to enter the indentation when the proximal end of the stopper is fastened to the shaft at the maximum insertion depth but not when the stopper is coupled to the shaft without the proximal end of the stopper being fastened to the shaft at the maximum insertion depth. 14. The system of claim 13, wherein: the protrusion from the elastic member is configured to resist displacement of the protrusion from the indentation along the shaft. 15. The system of claim 13, wherein: the protrusion from the elastic member is configured to resist displacement of the proximal end of the stopper from the maximum insertion depth from the proximal end of the swab. 16. The system of claim 11, wherein: the fastener is configured to slidably couple to the shaft of the swab. 17. The system of claim 11, wherein: the stopper is configured to slidably couple to the shaft of the swab. 18. The system of claim 11, wherein: the fastener includes an internal cavity configured to receive at least a portion of the shaft of the swab. 19. The system of claim 11, wherein: the stopper includes an internal cavity configured to receive at least a portion of the shaft of the swab. 20. The system of claim 11, wherein: the fastener includes a set of one or more tines configured to clamp onto the shaft of the swab.
